✨ Quotes You've Added

📖 3 Ways to Keep Your Data Current
➕

1. Add via Web Form

Click ➕ Add Quote in the top right. Fill in the item details. Saves instantly to Google Sheets and is searchable right away.

Best for: 1–5 new quotes
📊

2. Add Directly in Google Sheets

Open your Google Sheet → Quotes tab. Add rows directly — fill in description, price, supplierShort (required). Then click 🔄 Sync in the app to reload.

Best for: 5–50 new quotes
🤖

3. Ask Claude to Rebuild

Upload your updated Excel to Claude and say "rebuild with new data". Claude regenerates the app with all new base data merged in. Your Google Sheets data is untouched.

Best for: 50+ base catalogue updates
💡 Recommended workflow:
Daily: Use ➕ Add Quote as quotes come in — syncs to Google Sheets automatically.
Weekly: Check 🕐 Price Validity for expired quotes. Use 📋 Enquiry Assist to generate RFQs.
Monthly: Review supplier details in 🏢 Suppliers tab. Update any changed contacts or specialisations.
When updating the app UI: Upload new HTML to GitHub. Your Google Sheets data is always safe and untouched.

☁️ Connect Google Sheets
Deployment checklist — must be correct or connection will fail:

1️⃣ In Apps Script → Deploy → New deployment
2️⃣ Type: Web app
3️⃣ Execute as: Me
4️⃣ Who has access: Anyone (not "Anyone with Google account")
5️⃣ Copy the /exec URL (not the /dev URL)

⚠️ If you update the script, you must create a New deployment — not re-use the old one.
This is saved in your browser — you only enter it once per device.

Search, view and edit all supplier details. Changes save to Google Sheets and update the app immediately.

📘 Marine Supply Intelligence — User Guide
Complete reference for all features. 1,119 base quotes · 50 suppliers · AI-powered search · Google Sheets cloud sync.
Click any section in the table of contents to jump directly to it.
Contents
🔍 Search
✨ My Added Quotes
🏢 Supplier Directory

🤖 AI Features
🔄 Keeping Data Current
🔍 Search Main tab
✨ AI Search
Type any plain language query and press Search. AI analyses your query against all 1,119 quotes plus your added items.

Examples:
"cheapest safety gloves"
"who supplies bearings"
"items under $20 for engine room"
"compare pump prices"
Requires: Anthropic API key (enter via yellow banner). Keyword search always works without it.
⚡ Quick Filter Chips
Click any chip below the search bar for instant filtered results:

Under $10 Safety & LSA Engine Room Stationery Workshop & Tools Electrical Provisions Top Suppliers Price Gaps
🕐 Search History
Click the 🕐 clock icon inside the search bar to see your last 50 searches.

Click any item to re-run it instantly.
✕ removes individual entries.
Clear all wipes the full history.

History is saved to your browser and syncs to Google Sheets.
📊 Result Cards
Each card shows: description, best price, supplier, IMPA code, category, unit.

▼ Compare all quotes — expands a table showing every supplier quote for that item side by side.

✏️ Edit / Add My Price — opens the Add Quote form pre-filled with item details. Change any field before saving.

📎 + Photo / Datasheet — attach an image or PDF to the item.
✨ My Added Quotes Tab
➕ Adding a Quote
1
Click + Add Quote in the top right
2
Fill in: Description, IMPA code, Price, Unit, Supplier, Category, Remark, Date
3
Click 💾 Save Quote
4
Quote saves to Google Sheets and is immediately searchable
✏️ Editing a Quote
In the My Added Quotes table, click ✏️ Edit on any row.

All fields are pre-filled. Change what you need and click 💾 Save Quote.

The update syncs to Google Sheets immediately. Original quote ID and attachment are preserved.
🗑 Deleting a Quote
Click the 🗑 button on any row. A confirmation prompt appears before deletion.

Deletion syncs to Google Sheets immediately.
This cannot be undone. The quote will be removed from Sheets permanently.
⬇️ Export CSV
Downloads all your added quotes as a .csv file — opens in Excel.

Useful for bulk review, sharing with others, or keeping a local backup of your added data.
🔄 Sync
Reloads all quotes from Google Sheets into the app.

Use this when:
• Opening the app on a new device
• A colleague has added quotes via Sheets directly
• You edited data directly in the Google Sheet

Sync merges — it never deletes local data. Any quote only in your browser gets uploaded to Sheets first.
📦 Export My Version
Downloads a standalone HTML file with all your data baked in — quotes, attachments, search history.

Use for:
• Full offline backup
• Sharing with a colleague (they open it in any browser)
• Re-uploading to Netlify to update the live app
🏢 Supplier Directory Tab
🔍 Searching Suppliers
Type in the search bar to filter by:
• Short name (e.g. ITL)
• Supplier code (e.g. S99014)
• Full company name
• Specialisation (e.g. bearings)

Results update instantly as you type.
✏️ Editing a Supplier
Click any row or the ✏️ Edit button to open the edit modal.

You can update: Supplier Code, Full Name, Specialisation, Email, Phone, Notes.

Short name cannot be changed — it is the unique key linked to all quotes.

Changes save to Google Sheets and update the Add Quote supplier dropdown immediately.
➕ Adding a New Supplier
1
Click ➕ Add Supplier
2
Fill in Short Name, Supplier Code, Full Name (required)
3
Add Specialisation, Email, Phone, Notes (optional)
4
Click 💾 Save Supplier — appears in dropdown immediately
📋 Enquiry Assist Tab
How it works
Upload your enquiry Excel and the app matches each item against all 1,119 quotes, then recommends the best supplier and price for each line.
📂 Uploading an Enquiry
1
Drop your Excel onto the upload zone or click Browse File
2
Map the columns — Description, IMPA Code (optional), Quantity (optional). App auto-detects these.
3
Click 🔍 Match Items
4
Review results table — colour coded by match confidence
Supports: .xlsx · .xls · .csv · any column layout
🎯 Match Confidence
High — IMPA code match or 80%+ keyword overlap

Partial — 35–79% keyword overlap, worth a quick check

Low / No Match — new item or unusual description
🤖 AI Enhancement
After matching, a blue bar appears if there are low-confidence items.

Click 🤖 Enhance with AI — Claude analyses all unmatched items against your catalogue and finds better matches.

AI-improved items get an AI badge.
Requires: Anthropic API key
⬇️ Download Outputs
Filled Enquiry — your original file with 8 columns added: matched item, confidence, supplier short/code/full, best price, unit, remarks.

RFQ Draft — Excel with one sheet per supplier, formatted as a formal Request for Quotation ready to send.

✉️ Email Drafts — one professional email body per supplier with full item list. Click 📋 Copy to paste into Outlook/Gmail.
🕐 Price Validity Tab
What it shows
All your user-added quotes as cards, colour-coded by freshness:

Expired — older than your threshold
Review Soon — approaching expiry (75% of threshold)
Valid — within threshold
No Date — no date recorded
⚙️ Settings
Flag quotes older than: 3 / 6 / 12 / 24 months

Show filter: All / Expired only / Needs review / Still valid

Base catalogue records (1,119 quotes) have no date — they show as reference data only. Always re-enquire for these.
☁️ Google Sheets Sync Cloud storage
What syncs to Sheets
Every action automatically syncs:

✅ Add / Edit / Delete quotes → Quotes sheet
✅ Add / Delete quote attachments → Attachments sheet
✅ Add / Delete item attachments → ItemAttachments sheet
✅ Search history → SearchHistory sheet
✅ Supplier edits → Suppliers sheet
☁️ Connecting Google Sheets
1
Create a blank Google Sheet
2
Extensions → Apps Script → paste the provided script → Save
3
Deploy → New deployment → Web app · Execute as: Me · Access: Anyone
4
Copy the /exec URL
5
Click ☁️ Connect Sheets in the app → paste URL → Connect & Test
Important: After editing the Apps Script, always create a New Deployment — never reuse the old one or changes won't take effect.
🔄 Sync behaviour
Sync merges, never overwrites. If you have quotes in the browser not yet in Sheets, they are uploaded first, then everything is combined.

Bottom right bar shows sync status:
🟡 Syncing… · ✅ Synced · ❌ Error
📎 Attachments Photos & datasheets
Two types of attachments
Quote attachments — attached to a specific supplier quote you added. Managed in the ✨ My Added Quotes table (📎 column).

Item attachments — attached to a catalogue item by IMPA code. Visible on every search result card (📎 + Photo / Datasheet button).
📎 Adding an Attachment
Click + Add or + Photo / Datasheet → select a file.

Supported: Images (JPG, PNG) and PDF
Max size: 800KB per file

Images show as a thumbnail — click to view full size.
PDFs show a 📄 icon — click to download.

Attachments sync to Google Sheets automatically.
To keep files under 800KB: compress images before uploading, or paste an OneDrive/SharePoint link in the Notes field instead.
📦 Export & Backup
📦 Export My Version
Found in My Added Quotes tab. Downloads a complete standalone HTML file with all your data baked in.

Use cases:
• Upload to Netlify to update the live URL
• Send to a colleague — they open it in any browser
• Keep as a dated offline backup
Recommended: Export once a week and re-upload to Netlify to keep the live app current.
⬇️ Export CSV
Found in My Added Quotes tab. Downloads all user-added quotes as a .csv file.

Opens in Excel. Use for bulk review, reporting, or sharing quote data with others.
🔄 Updating the App (UI changes)
When Claude provides a new HTML file with bug fixes or new features:

1
Download the new HTML file from Claude
2
Go to netlify.com/drop
3
Drag and drop the new file
4
Your data in Google Sheets is untouched — click 🔄 Sync to reload
🤖 AI Features Requires API key
🔑 Setting up your API Key
1
Go to console.anthropic.com → log in → API Keys
2
Click Create Key → copy the key (starts with sk-ant-...)
3
In the app, paste into the yellow banner → Save Key
4
Key saves in your browser — enter once per device
✨ AI Search
Keyword search runs first and shows results immediately. AI then runs in the background and re-ranks results based on semantic understanding of your query.

Works best for complex queries like "what do I need for fire safety inspection" or "compare engine consumables".
🤖 AI Enquiry Enhancement
In the Enquiry Assist tab, after keyword matching, click 🤖 Enhance with AI to send all low-confidence items to Claude for smarter matching.

Claude uses your full catalogue context to find the closest match even for unusual descriptions or partial names.
🔄 Keeping Data Current
📅 Recommended Weekly Workflow
Mon–Fri
Add individual quotes via + Add Quote as you receive them. Each saves to Google Sheets instantly.
Weekly
Use 📋 Enquiry Assist to upload your enquiry list and auto-fill recommended suppliers before sending RFQs.
Monthly
Check 🕐 Price Validity for expired quotes. Re-enquire on items flagged as expired.
When needed
Upload a new bulk Excel to Claude and say "rebuild with new data" for large base catalogue updates (50+ items).
3 Ways to Add Data
1 — Web Form (1–5 quotes)
Click + Add Quote, fill in fields, save. Instant.

2 — Google Sheets directly (5–50 quotes)
Open your Google Sheet, add rows to the Quotes tab, click 🔄 Sync in the app.

3 — Claude Rebuild (50+ quotes)
Upload updated Excel to Claude and say "rebuild with new data".
Marine Supply Intelligence · 1,119 base quotes · 50 suppliers · Connected to Google Sheets
For new features or changes, send your request to Claude with this conversation.

IMPA Category Reference
34 categories · 50,000+ codes
